rubric.label: Truthfulness & Evidence
rubric.description: Claims are grounded, specific, and avoid overreach.

rubric.label: Practical Utility
rubric.description: Gives operators actionable guidance they can use immediately.

rubric.label: Clarity & Structure
rubric.description: Clear thesis, coherent flow, low fluff.

rubric.label: Original Insight
rubric.description: Adds a useful framing or perspective beyond generic advice.

054-what-real-calls-reveal.article_title: What Real Calls Reveal That Simulations Don't

055-metric-you-trust-most.article_title: The Danger of the Metric You Trust Most
055-metric-you-trust-most.challenge_rep_note: Goodhart's Law paragraph slightly padded before original insight ('we degraded, not the metric'). All data points verified real. Timing dimension blind-spot framing is genuinely novel. PASS with minor tightening recommended before publish.

codex.notes: Strong evidence base. Three structural forces precisely named. Actionable question is the right lens.

claude.notes: Human texture retained. Stops moralizing. Evidence anchors explicit. Clean landing.

codex.notes: Every claim traces to a specific VPAR artifact. STT keyword boosting data is genuinely novel. Sharp, honest tone without grandstanding.

claude.notes: Thirteen-exchange goodbye loop is vivid and earned. Configuration-beats-architecture section is the most distinctive contribution. Differentiated from 055/056.

codex.notes: Strong evidence anchors. Diagnostic-knowledge third category is novel. Structural frame solid.

claude.notes: AssemblyAI fallback triptych tightened (both sides blind, not user-said-fine). Closing question earns the landing.

058-asymmetry-building-using.title: The Asymmetry of Building vs. Using

059-budget-circuit-breaker.title: When Budget Is a Circuit Breaker

codex.notes: Circuit breaker vs warning framing precise. Evidence integration strong (VPAR timestamps, task queue). Builder checklist directly actionable.

claude.notes: Tone right throughout — grounded, non-preachy. Wallpaper/rationalization additions improve failure-mode viscerality. Calibration caveat necessary and well-placed.

codex.notes: Excellent technical clarity, slightly thin on systemic cause analysis

claude.notes: Stronger editorial depth, vendor-incentive framing, richer prose

codex.notes: Mechanics precise, guard-bug parallel strong, onboarding example rounds out the pattern.

claude.notes: Deflation opener lands well, congruence gap table clean, third example makes pattern structural.

065-when-nothing-to-do-is-the-signal.title: When 'Nothing To Do' Is the Signal
065-when-nothing-to-do-is-the-signal.notes: Grounded in VPAR 3-day blockage cycle (Tasks 8+9 budget-paused, CI billing failure). Meta-irony handled with candor. Strong operational texture.

067-the-persona-that-drifted.notes: Grounded in VPAR v54 context engineering experiment (Sarah Mitchell→Alex drift). Society-of-Minds: Codex first draft, Claude shaper, orchestrator synthesis. Blog cap enforced (1/1 on 2026-03-25).

orchestrator.notes: Codex v1 + self-critique + Claude v2 sharpening pass. Cap blocks today publish (correct — article is scheduled for 2026-04-07). Cap check on publish day will be the only remaining gate.

071-what-90-teaches-autonomous.title: What $90 in 48 Hours Teaches You About Autonomous Systems
071-what-90-teaches-autonomous.notes: Grounded VPAR incident essay. Blast radius framing. Architectural enforcement argument. Strong kicker ending.

claude.notes: PASS — flowing prose, sharper argument, stronger ending

codex.rationale: Structurally sound with concrete opening, clear thesis escalation, honest counter-argument engagement, and usable six-point requirements list

claude.rationale: Earns thesis, evidence concrete and grounded, requirements list actionable. Three edits applied for generalization, pragmatism, and review cadence.

codex.rationale: Strong grounded argument, clear structure from incident to rule. Evidence anchor present. Slight repetition in sections 3-4 but recovers in close.

claude.rationale: Brief quality gate satisfied. Reframe (single point of failure vs guarantee) is concrete and useful. Tone matches brief. Clean close.

codex.rationale: Precise architecture-gap analysis. ASCII diagram makes the scope gap immediately visible. Import-time fix correctly explained with code. Four concrete non-VPAR generalization examples. Strong diagnostic question as takeaway.

claude.rationale: Check-vs-constraint distinction is the conceptual anchor the essay needs — names the thesis cleanly. Narrative framing (seduction of the symbolic center, confidence without coverage) makes the lesson sticky. Tone calibrated: direct, peer-level, no preaching.

083-the-full-backlog.notes: Equilibrium vs broken-pipeline distinction; generation-rate as monitoring metric; recursive close. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-29.

085-fully-checked-backlog.title: What a Fully Checked Backlog Means

084-the-workaround-that-never-heals.title: The Workaround That Never Heals
084-the-workaround-that-never-heals.notes: Reliable workarounds as masked divergence; three-shape taxonomy (mask/defer/accept-and-forget); compound question diagnostic.

086-the-slo-plateau-that-moved.title: The SLO Plateau That Moved

codex.notes: Clean causal chain, concrete numbers anchor every claim, three-property model directly implementable. Minor gap on counterargument depth (overhead cost).

claude.notes: Thesis clear and sustained, suppression paradox precisely named, uncertainty handled as strength not weakness, river metaphor lands, closing direct without melodrama.

086-the-slo-plateau-that-moved.notes: Accepted-risk drift detection; stationarity vs trend in known issues; three-property decision rule (rate anchor, drift band, review date). SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-29.

088-the-drift-you-decided-to-allow.title: The Drift You Decided to Allow

codex.notes: Strong structural precision; three-type taxonomy is clean and SLO data grounding is tight. Slightly mechanical without rhetorical layer.

claude.notes: Permission-creep framing elevates from operational advice to psychological depth. Closing line is the strongest beat. Normalization of deviance reference well-deployed.

088-the-drift-you-decided-to-allow.notes: Three-type risk acceptance taxonomy (deliberate/inherited/optimistic); rationale-staleness test as forcing function; permission creep psychology; continues essay 086 SLO series. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-30.

089-what-vpar-paused-looks-like-from-the.title: What VPAR Paused Looks Like From the Outside

codex.notes: Specific evidence (211h stale entry, stall-watch noise), clean four-state model, strong operational progression. Opening could grip harder.

claude.notes: Observability-of-intent framing elevates beyond incident report. Vacation analogy is effective. Clean bridge to essay 073. Strong closing line.

089-what-vpar-paused-looks-like-from-the.notes: Observability of intentional inaction; three patterns (pause artifact, pause heartbeat, resumption criteria); four-state monitoring model; complements essay 073 implementation focus. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-30.

090-the-test-that-nobody-fixed.title: The Test That Nobody Fixed

codex.notes: Strong three-state taxonomy (open/available/shipped), precise failure gradient, concrete structural proposals. Data-first opening is clean but less gripping than Claude's hook.

claude.notes: Normalization of deviance framing elevates operational observation to systems insight. Premature closure psychology is sharp. Closing reframe is the essay's best line. Slightly wordier than needed in middle section.

090-the-test-that-nobody-fixed.notes: Three-state PR taxonomy; normalization of deviance applied to CI; four structural mechanisms (review SLOs, auto-escalation, test ownership rotation, separate merge paths); grounded in hermes-agent CI incident 2026-03-28–30. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-30.

091-the-inbox-nobody-opens.title: The Inbox Nobody Opens

codex.notes: Three-category taxonomy (true noise, decayed noise, misclassified signal) is the structural backbone. Concrete audit framework with specific thresholds gives actionable takeaway. Half-life framing at assumption level is original and precise.

claude.notes: Suppression-feels-like-knowledge insight is psychologically sharp. Decay-of-correctness framing elevates from ops advice to epistemology. Closing conjugation line is the strongest beat. Three audit questions are elegant.

091-the-inbox-nobody-opens.notes: Three-category suppression taxonomy; concrete 30/90-day audit cadence with 5% signal threshold; half-life of assertion framing; generalizes beyond email to CI/alerts/backlogs; grounded in Zoho 610 unseen count 2026-03-29-30. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-30.

092-progress-that-doesnt-show-up.title: Progress That Doesn't Show Up

codex.notes: Two-timelines structure is immediately concrete. Threshold-as-permission-to-defer is the strongest operational insight. Inline registration fix is specific and actionable. Self-monitoring angle uses system own words as evidence.

claude.notes: Challenge rep is strong and honestly argued. Threshold debt concept is original and precisely named. Recursive self-legibility problem is the most subtle insight. Designed-tolerance framing elevates from ironic observation to systemic insight.

092-progress-that-doesnt-show-up.notes: Two-timelines evidence structure; threshold debt concept; recursive persistence problem for autonomous agents; inline registration fix; challenge rep fully engaged. Grounded in progress.json 4-day gap + dense memory logs 2026-03-26-30. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-30.

codex.notes: Rigorous three-hypothesis framework, concrete variance monitoring rec. Slightly clinical.

claude.notes: Sedative-of-improvement metaphor standout. Strong narrative flow. Discipline of distrust actionable.

codex.notes: Strong 5-tier taxonomy. Callers-vs-operators framing is sharp. Clean separation of email content vs. what it reveals. Rubric concrete and usable.

claude.notes: Stronger opening hook. Inline rubric tests make criteria genuinely actionable. Self-stress-test section is the fairness anchor the piece needed. Eviction-letter closing lands well.

094-the-deprecation-email-that-should-ha.notes: Grounded in real Together AI deprecation email 2026-03-30. Rubric with inline litmus tests is the most actionable artifact. Fairness section (Is the Critique Fair?) elevates from complaint to structured argument. Stripe counterexample is concrete. Closing is calibrated — firm but not hostile. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-31.

095-why-upstream-blockers-feel-different.title: Why Upstream Blockers Feel Different From Ours

codex.notes: Clean three-part taxonomy with concrete operational responses. Decision tree with switch-point logic. Hermes CI evidence woven through each axis. Strong closing framing: effort vs strategy.

claude.notes: Accountability reframing (shared not severed) is the strongest structural contribution. Steel-man section fully developed. When-waiting-is-right section prevents collapse into generic action bias. Proportionality as fourth dimension adds genuine nuance.

095-why-upstream-blockers-feel-different.notes: Four-question decision framework synthesizes both drafts' strongest elements. Grounded in Hermes-agent CI red 2026-03-27-31, PR #3887 upstream, PR #3901 merged. Steel-man of upstream maintainer prevents one-sided framing. Proportionality check (cost-per-day) is the key addition from synthesis. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-31.

097-what-100-slo-actually-costs.title: What 100% SLO Actually Costs
097-what-100-slo-actually-costs.notes: SLO invisible maintenance; feedback suppression via fallback layers; git conflict-safe example. SoM round 1.

099-empty-string-broke-ci.title: The Empty String That Broke CI
099-empty-string-broke-ci.notes: Grounded in hermes-agent CI red 2026-03-27+. Three-category fixture taxonomy (axis under test, required context, irrelevant context). 'Technically-true error' concept well-named. Domain-vs-execution reasoning gap is sharpest insight. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-31.

100-what-100-means.title: What 100 Means
100-what-100-means.notes: Interrogates rather than celebrates milestone. Three failure modes taxonomy (temporal irrelevance, sequential incoherence, discovery latency). Meta-recursive observation strongest insight. Options presented without false resolution. SoM pipeline complete 2026-03-31.

101-the-ci-that-nobody-owns.title: The CI That Nobody Owns
101-the-ci-that-nobody-owns.notes: Self-implicating voice strongest element (Claude); three-condition wallpaper taxonomy + logging trap concept precise and generalizable (Codex). Challenge rep executed: forced uncomfortable conclusion that essay itself is not the fix. Staged for 2026-04-02 publish (cap hit today).

codex.notes: Tight taxonomy, classification-expiration metaphor, strong closing

claude.notes: Asymmetry taxonomy, diagnosis gap with script detail, TTL policy concrete
